content.problemStatement:
Chef's new friend hErd gave him two functions fff and ggg.


The function fff is defined over xxx (x‚Č•1)(x\geq 1)(x‚Č•1) as:
f(x)={0,if x=1f(x2)+1,if x is evenf(‚Ćäx2‚Ćč),if x is oddf(x) = \begin{cases}
0, & \text{if } x = 1 \\
f\left( \frac{x}{2} \right) + 1, & \text{if } x \text{ is even} \\
f\left( \left\lfloor \frac{x}{2} \right\rfloor \right), & \text{if } x \text{ is odd} \\
\end{cases}f(x)=‚é©‚é®‚éß‚Äč0,f(2x‚Äč)+1,f(‚Ćä2x‚Äč‚Ćč),‚Äčif x=1if x is evenif x is odd‚Äč
The function ggg is defined over xxx (x‚Č•1)(x\geq 1)(x‚Č•1) as:
g(x)={1,if x=12‚čÖg(x2)+1,if x is even2‚čÖg(‚Ćäx2‚Ćč),if x is oddg(x) = \begin{cases}
1, & \text{if } x = 1 \\
2\cdot g\left( \frac{x}{2} \right) + 1, & \text{if } x \text{ is even} \\
2\cdot g\left( \left\lfloor \frac{x}{2} \right\rfloor \right), & \text{if } x \text{ is odd} \\
\end{cases}g(x)=‚é©‚é®‚éß‚Äč1,2‚čÖg(2x‚Äč)+1,2‚čÖg(‚Ćä2x‚Äč‚Ćč),‚Äčif x=1if x is evenif x is odd‚Äčwhere ‚Ćäz‚Ćč\left\lfloor z \right\rfloor‚Ćäz‚Ćč, denotes the greatest integer less than or equal to zzz.

He also gave Chef two integers LLL and RRR. Chef has to find the **maximum** value of f(x)+g(x)f(x)+g(x)f(x)+g(x) for L‚Č§x‚Č§RL \leq x \leq RL‚Č§x‚Č§R.


Input Format

The first line of input will contain a single integer TTT, denoting the number of test cases.
The only line of each test case contains two space-separated integers LLL and RRR, as mentioned in the statement.


Output Format
For each test case, output on a new line the **maximum** value of f(x)+g(x)f(x)+g(x)f(x)+g(x) for L‚Č§x‚Č§RL \leq x \leq RL‚Č§x‚Č§R.
